name: After hours the block
overview:
After Hours: The Block is a late-night R&B countdown series that blends music, storytelling, and real-life relationship experiences into one immersive show.

Hosted by JR London and Jay Da Movie, with special appearances from Savannah J, each episode counts down the Top 10 R&B tracks while exploring themes like love, heartbreak, situationships, and late-night decisions.

More than just a countdown, the series connects every song to a relatable moment, turning music into a narrative that reflects modern relationships and emotional experiences.

With a smooth late-night atmosphere, performance-driven visuals, and honest conversation, After Hours: The Block delivers a fresh take on music television for a new generation.
